patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/local.py b/asgiref/local.py
index 845313a..52aaa0f 100644
--- a/asgiref/local.py
+++ b/asgiref/local.py
@@ -111,10 +111,7 @@ class Local:
                 # need any locks)
                 yield self._storage.cvar
         else:
-            # Lock for thread_critical=False as other threads
-            # can access the exact same storage object
-            with self._thread_lock:
-                yield self._storage
+            yield self._storage
 
     def __getattr__(self, key):
         with self._lock_storage() as storage:
@@ -128,4 +125,4 @@ class Local:
 
     def __delattr__(self, key):
         with self._lock_storage() as storage:
-            delattr(storage, key)
+            delattr(storage, key)
\ No newline at end of file
